messages.content: 负责组织实施并参与信息系统的设计、开发、推广和应用；负责系统应用的跟踪；指导信息系统、数据平台的架构设计、模型搭建、框架开发，并持续进行优化和技术研究；负责对企业级平台软件、工程应用软件、信息系统软件、数据平台相关具体技术方案的设计、研发、优化，结合业务进行技术选型及规划。英文

Responsible for organizing and implementing the design, development, promotion, and application of information systems; responsible for tracking the application of systems; guiding the architecture design, model building, and framework development of information systems and data platforms, and continuously optimizing and conducting technical research; responsible for the design, development, and optimization of specific technical solutions for enterprise platform software, engineering application software, information system software, and data platforms, and conducting technical selection and planning in conjunction with business needs.
负责勘探开发数据库建设以及数据管理。英文
Responsible for exploring and developing database construction and data management.
负责数字化新技术和产品的研发。英文
Responsible for the research and development of digital new technologies and products.
负责大数据及人人工智能技术研发。英文
Responsible for the research and development of big data and artificial intelligence technologies.
机器学习研究及软件研发 英文
Machine learning research and software development
民航大数据分析及算法研究。 英文
Civil aviation big data analysis and algorithm research
负责各类机器学习及人工智能算法的研究工作，包括神经网络、支持向量机、集成学习算法、KNN聚类以及目前比较热门的深度学习算法如，CNN，RNN，LSTM等。 英文

Responsible for researching various machine learning and artificial intelligence algorithms, including neural networks, support vector machines, ensemble learning algorithms, K-nearest neighbors clustering, as well as currently popular deep learning algorithms such as CNN, RNN, LSTM, etc.
负责机场大数据分析平台以及相关应用的开发。英文
Responsible for the development of airport big data analytics platform and related applications.
